transcript.text:
[On a rainy day like this...]
[Korean Food]
[The texture of barley rice]
[Mix it up!]
[It makes me cry...]
[Our place is a hidden gem]
[This hole-in-a-wall restaurant...]
Hello everyone
I've been craving some potato pancakes because of the gloomy weather
This place is a little hidden
The owner asked to keep this place a secret, so I will not be revealing the name & the location
This place has potato pancakes and potato dough soup
Looked yummy
Let's head inside
Hello~!
Their menu

The place is filled with the smell of soybean soup
Hello
4 servings of the potato dough soup,
-Alone...? -Yes
I eat a lot
1 potato pancake,
3 servings of barley rice,
[I need to write this down...]
Is the spicy pork good?
People say it is I will say it is too if you ask me
Then I'll take one
We don't like our restaurant name to be broadcasted
Those people come here from watching videos and not from the rumors
We get very busy during lunch hours anyway Up to 50 people in line
We wouldn't be able to accommodate everyone Our place is very small as you can see
[Thank you for letting me film here!]

[Let's get the food out for the rainy day!]
Cheonggukjang (Soybean Paste Soup)
[Get the blended potato on the pan]
[The visuals]
[Gamja Jeon (potato pancake)]
[Cooked with vegetables and ongsimi (potato dough)]
[Gamja Ongsimi (Potato Dough Soup)]
[With barley rice's pairs]
[Barley rice]
[Jeyuk Bokkeum (Spicy Stir-fried Pork)]
[Korean Food Feast!]
[How in the world...]
I came for an early dinner, but the place is packed already
Let's put them together
This looks delicious
[This deserves a photo]

It's been a while and it looks amazing
Bon appetit
They're known for their potato pancakes
Insane
Looks good, right?
The chunks are pretty big
Dip in soy sauce
Very chewy and delicious
I can feel all the potato chunks
There are small pieces in here
They're very chewy
It's like something like a potato ball
It tastes great
Amazing
I'll have to get some more to-go
Dip it

Does it suit your taste?
It's really good
Young people don't really like this type of food
This is really amazing
The best I ever had
It's really good
I'm surprised you eat this much and stay skinny
The soup is their other specialty, so I'll try it
It's completely packed
I can see the little potato pieces inside too
The small potato chunks in here are chewy
They do it right
It can be a little bland The flavors are not strong
Both of the potato dishes
Feels like home-food
Let's put some salt

Just a little bit
That's way too much
Goodbye
Perfect
1 bite of the pork
It already looks so good
My mom comes to mind
I always eat outside and not at home So this gives me a very homey feeling
Barley rice
The texture is...
It's really fun to chew
I need to make bibimbap
I need to calm down a little
Put this in
Put everything
Bean sprouts

Cut a little
It's going to be great
Some soybean paste and gochujang paste
This is definitely homemade
Sesame oil 3 swirls
Let's mix now
That smells amazing
You know when you mix everything in with rice at home
That sesame oil smell
Some radish kimchi
These kimchi are the best
A little bit of the soybean soup as well
What do I do? This looks way too good
1 bite
[Are you crying?]
It's been a while and I'm loving it

Amazing
[She's not angry]
It's just about right
It doesn't smell funky
A clean taste
A good Cheonggukjang
I love the smell
There's a reason why this place is always crowded
[Did you starve a couple of days...?]
These 2 are the best
[Don't forget about me]
It's big and thick
A lot of places shred the potato instead of blending
They're good either way, but I prefer it blended just like this one
It was good warm and it's also good cold
Let's gather all the favorites in this bowl

[So just the potato dough...?]
I ate a lot of them earlier, but there are still so many
I have a great idea
Break up the potato in here
Amazing
Excuse me
Can I have 1 potato pancake for to-go?
-You can take the leftover to-go -This? I don't think this will last
It's so good that I'm going to take some home to have it with makgeolli (rice wine)
I'll take this soup home too to share with my housemate
I'll focus on the bibimbap today
[Get some on the lettuce leaf]
Do they grow these here?
Our neighbor does
It's so fresh that it looks like it was just pulled out of the ground
The bibimbap rice is so good, I want to take this home too

[Give the kitchen a break!]
[Reheated Cheonggukjang]
That looks good
[Tzu-fuel time]
The owner's brother gave me this just now
Thank you
[Come here]
[Empty out everything here...]
[And she's eating veggies on her own?]
The vegetables are good too
I should've saved some rice
Incredible...
[That was like 10 servings of food...]
It's because the food was very good
You don't even have a belly
I had a very nice homefood-like meal today
